title: 7 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, coding phase
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates seven practical tactics for deploying Antigravity 2.0, an AI agent, on large enterprise codebases. The tactics cover agent skill encoding, automated testing loops, headless browser verification, and asynchronous task offloading to improve code quality and developer productivity.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through seven practical tactics for running Antigravity 2.0, an AI coding agent, against large enterprise codebases during the coding phase. The tactics include encoding agent skills, building automated testing loops, verifying changes through headless browser automation, and offloading tasks asynchronously. The focus is on raising code quality and developer productivity through self-correcting loops and workflow automation rather than one-off generation.
